questions.q: In which 1965 film, based on an R. K. Narayan novel, did Waheeda Rehman play the dancer Rosie opposite Dev Anand?
questions.explanation: Waheeda Rehman played Rosie in Vijay Anand's 1965 film Guide, adapted from R. K. Narayan's novel The Guide.

questions.q: Which celebrated filmmaker and actor gave Waheeda Rehman her major Hindi-film break in films like Pyaasa and Kaagaz Ke Phool?
questions.explanation: Guru Dutt launched Waheeda Rehman in Hindi cinema and cast her in classics such as Pyaasa (1957) and Kaagaz Ke Phool (1959).

questions.q: Waheeda Rehman received India's highest cinematic honour, the Dadasaheb Phalke Award, for which year?
questions.explanation: Waheeda Rehman was named for the Dadasaheb Phalke Award for the year 2021 (presented in 2023) for her contribution to Indian cinema.

questions.q: In which year was the actress Waheeda Rehman born?
questions.explanation: Waheeda Rehman was born in 1938.

questions.q: Before entering Hindi cinema, Waheeda Rehman was trained in which classical Indian art form?
questions.explanation: Waheeda Rehman was a trained classical dancer, a skill that featured prominently in many of her film roles.

questions.q: In which 1957 Guru Dutt film about a struggling poet did Waheeda Rehman play the warm-hearted prostitute Gulabo?
questions.explanation: Waheeda Rehman played Gulabo in Guru Dutt's 1957 film Pyaasa, a story centred on a neglected poet.

questions.q: Which legendary actor starred opposite Waheeda Rehman as the protagonist Raju in the 1965 film Guide?
questions.explanation: Dev Anand played Raju the guide opposite Waheeda Rehman in the 1965 film Guide.

questions.q: Waheeda Rehman began her acting career in which South Indian language films before moving to Hindi cinema?
questions.explanation: Waheeda Rehman began her screen career in Telugu and Tamil films before being discovered for Hindi cinema.

questions.q: Which 1959 Guru Dutt film, now considered a classic, was India's first film shot in CinemaScope and featured Waheeda Rehman?
questions.explanation: Kaagaz Ke Phool (1959), starring Waheeda Rehman, was India's first film shot in CinemaScope.

questions.q: In which 1962 film, based on a Bimal Mitra novel, did Waheeda Rehman appear alongside Meena Kumari and Guru Dutt?
questions.explanation: Waheeda Rehman appeared in Sahib Bibi Aur Ghulam (1962), alongside Meena Kumari and Guru Dutt.

questions.q: For which 1965 film did Waheeda Rehman win the Filmfare Award for Best Actress?
questions.explanation: Waheeda Rehman won the Filmfare Best Actress award for her role as Rosie in Guide (1965).

questions.q: In the 1965 film Guide, the song 'Aaj Phir Jeene Ki Tamanna Hai' is picturised on Waheeda Rehman. Who was the playback singer?
questions.explanation: Lata Mangeshkar sang 'Aaj Phir Jeene Ki Tamanna Hai', picturised on Waheeda Rehman in Guide.

questions.q: Which music director composed the songs for the 1965 film Guide, featuring Waheeda Rehman?
questions.explanation: S. D. Burman composed the celebrated music for Guide (1965).

questions.q: In which 1962 mystery thriller, remembered for the song 'Kahin Deep Jale Kahin Dil', did Waheeda Rehman star opposite Biswajeet?
questions.explanation: Waheeda Rehman starred in the 1962 suspense film Bees Saal Baad opposite Biswajeet.

questions.q: Waheeda Rehman played a nurse who falls in love with a patient in which 1969 black-and-white film directed by Asit Sen?
questions.explanation: In Asit Sen's Khamoshi (1969), Waheeda Rehman played a nurse, opposite Rajesh Khanna.

questions.q: In which 1960 Guru Dutt production set around a Muslim social milieu did Waheeda Rehman star opposite Guru Dutt and Rehman?
questions.explanation: Waheeda Rehman starred in the 1960 Guru Dutt production Chaudhvin Ka Chand, a Muslim social drama.

questions.q: Which 1971 film, produced and directed by Sunil Dutt, paired him with Waheeda Rehman and was India's official Oscar entry?
questions.explanation: Reshma Aur Shera (1971), directed by and starring Sunil Dutt with Waheeda Rehman, was India's official entry to the Academy Awards.

questions.q: Waheeda Rehman won her second Filmfare Best Actress award for which 1968 film opposite Manoj Kumar?
questions.explanation: Waheeda Rehman won the Filmfare Best Actress award for Neel Kamal (1968), her second such win after Guide.

questions.q: In the 1966 romantic drama Teesri Kasam, Waheeda Rehman played a nautanki dancer named Hirabai opposite which actor?
questions.explanation: In Teesri Kasam (1966), Waheeda Rehman played Hirabai opposite Raj Kapoor, who played the bullock-cart driver Hiraman.

questions.q: The Indian government honoured Waheeda Rehman with which civilian award in 2011?
questions.explanation: Waheeda Rehman received the Padma Bhushan in 2011; she had earlier been awarded the Padma Shri in 1972.

questions.q: In the 2006 film Rang De Basanti, Waheeda Rehman played the grieving mother of which character?
options: Ajay Rathod, played by R. Madhavan
questions.explanation: In Rang De Basanti (2006), Waheeda Rehman played the mother of Flight Lieutenant Ajay Rathod, the character played by R. Madhavan.

questions.q: Waheeda Rehman was first noticed by Guru Dutt around a dance number in which 1955 Telugu film?
questions.explanation: Guru Dutt noticed Waheeda Rehman after her dance in the Telugu film Rojulu Marayi (1955).

questions.q: Waheeda Rehman's Hindi-film debut came in which 1956 Guru Dutt production, where she played a vamp-like role?
questions.explanation: Waheeda Rehman made her Hindi debut in C.I.D. (1956), a Guru Dutt production directed by Raj Khosla.

questions.q: In the 1962 film Sahib Bibi Aur Ghulam, what was the name of the character played by Waheeda Rehman?
questions.explanation: Waheeda Rehman played Jaba in Sahib Bibi Aur Ghulam (1962), while Meena Kumari played the tragic Chhoti Bahu.

questions.q: Waheeda Rehman married which fellow actor, her co-star from films such as Shagun and Reshma Aur Shera?
questions.explanation: Waheeda Rehman married actor Kamaljeet, whose real name was Shashi Rekhi, in 1974.

questions.q: In the 1956 film C.I.D., the song 'Kahin Pe Nigaahein Kahin Pe Nishaana' was picturised on Waheeda Rehman. Who was the playback singer?
questions.explanation: Shamshad Begum sang 'Kahin Pe Nigaahein Kahin Pe Nishaana', picturised on Waheeda Rehman in C.I.D. (1956).

questions.q: For which 1971 film did Waheeda Rehman win the National Film Award for Best Actress?
questions.explanation: Waheeda Rehman won the National Film Award for Best Actress for Reshma Aur Shera (1971).

questions.q: Waheeda Rehman played the leading lady Anjana opposite Dilip Kumar's twin double role in which 1967 hit film?
questions.explanation: Waheeda Rehman played Anjana in Ram Aur Shyam (1967), in which Dilip Kumar played identical twins; the role earned her a Filmfare Best Actress nomination.

questions.q: Waheeda Rehman played the ailing grandmother Annapurna Mehra in which 2009 film directed by Rakeysh Omprakash Mehra and set in Old Delhi?
questions.explanation: In Delhi-6 (2009), directed by Rakeysh Omprakash Mehra, Waheeda Rehman played Annapurna Mehra, the grandmother who returns with her grandson to the old walled city of Delhi.

questions.q: An English-language biography of Waheeda Rehman, based on conversations with her, was written in 2014 by which author?
questions.explanation: Nasreen Munni Kabir authored the 2014 book 'Conversations with Waheeda Rehman', based on extended interviews with the actress.
